upper_intermediate.title: Zero & First Conditional + Future Time Clauses
upper_intermediate.content:
📌 Zero Conditional – Sự thật chung, kết quả luôn xảy ra
Cấu trúc: If/When + Present Simple, Present Simple

Dùng để diễn đạt:
✦ Sự thật khoa học, quy luật tự nhiên:
If you heat water to 100°C, it boils.
When the sun goes down, it gets dark.

✦ Thói quen, kết quả luôn xảy ra khi điều kiện xảy ra:
If I drink too much coffee, I can't sleep.
If people are talking all the time, I can't concentrate.

✦ Lưu ý: Có thể thay if bằng when mà không thay đổi nghĩa.
Dogs can attack you when you are scared.
📌 First Conditional – Điều kiện có thể xảy ra trong tương lai
Cấu trúc: If/Unless + Present Simple, will/can/may/might/must/should + infinitive

1. Dùng để nói về những điều có thể xảy ra ở tương lai:
If it rains, we will stay home.
I will call you if I need your help.

2. KHÔNG dùng will trong mệnh đề if:
❌ I'll help you if you will need me.
✅ I'll help you if you need me.

3. Dùng unless = if ... not:
I won't go on holiday unless I save some money.
(= I won't go on holiday if I don't save some money.)

4. Dùng in case – đề phòng khả năng xảy ra:
I'll take my umbrella in case it rains.
⚠️ Khác if: in case = mang dù dù trời có mưa hay không (chuẩn bị trước); if = chỉ mang dù khi trời mưa.
I'll take my umbrella if it rains. (= chỉ mang khi có mưa)
📌 Future Time Clauses – Mệnh đề thời gian tương lai
Cấu trúc: When/After/Before/Until/As soon as/Once + Present Simple/Present Perfect, will + infinitive

Điểm quan trọng: Sau when, after, before, until, as soon as, once... → dùng thì hiện tại (KHÔNG dùng will):
When I am 65, I will retire. ❌ ~~When I will be~~
I'll call you as soon as I get back.

Dùng Present Perfect sau mệnh đề thời gian → nhấn mạnh hành động sẽ hoàn thành trước:
I'll go to bed as soon as I have finished my homework.
I won't leave until you have arrived.

Dấu phẩy:
✦ Mệnh đề thời gian đầu câu → có dấu phẩy: When I am 65, I will retire.
✦ Mệnh đề thời gian cuối câu → không dấu phẩy: I will retire when I am 65.
If you heat ice, it melts.Zero conditional – quy luật tự nhiên
I will call you if I need help.First conditional – khả năng có thể xảy ra
I will text you as soon as I arrive.Future time clause – dùng hiện tại sau as soon as
I'll take a jacket in case it gets cold.in case – chuẩn bị trước cho khả năng xảy ra

exercises.q: If you ___ ice, it turns to water.
exercises.exp: Zero conditional – sự thật khoa học → if + present simple

exercises.q: I ___ you if I need any help.
exercises.exp: First conditional – khả năng tương lai → will + infinitive

exercises.q: She won't pass the exam ___ she studies harder.
exercises.exp: unless = if ... not → She won't pass if she doesn't study harder

exercises.q: I'll take some cash ___ the ATMs aren't working.
exercises.exp: in case = đề phòng khả năng → mang tiền dù có hay không có ATM

exercises.q: Call me as soon as you ___ home.
exercises.exp: Future time clause – sau as soon as → present simple, KHÔNG dùng will

exercises.q: When I ___ 30, I want to own my own business.
exercises.exp: Future time clause – sau when → present simple

exercises.q: If dogs ___ scared, they sometimes bite.
exercises.exp: Zero conditional – hành vi chung của động vật → present simple

exercises.q: I won't eat anything ___ I finish work. I'm too busy.
exercises.exp: until = cho đến khi → phù hợp nhất với ngữ cảnh

exercises.q: She might fail the test ___ she doesn't revise.
exercises.exp: First conditional với might → if + present simple

exercises.q: Once you ___ the instructions, the task will be easy.
exercises.exp: once + present perfect → nhấn mạnh hành động phải hoàn thành trước

exercises.q: I ___ the dinner ready before you get home.
exercises.exp: Future perfect trong mệnh đề chính – hoàn thành trước một mốc tương lai

exercises.q: Plants die if you ___ them enough water.
exercises.exp: Zero conditional – sự thật chung → present simple (phủ định)

exercises.q: I'll wait here ___ she comes back.
exercises.exp: until = cho đến khi → hành động tiếp tục cho đến khi điều kiện xảy ra

exercises.q: We ___ to the beach if the weather is good this weekend.
exercises.exp: First conditional – điều kiện có thể xảy ra → will + infinitive

exercises.q: I'll send you the report as soon as I ___ finished it.
exercises.exp: as soon as + present perfect → nhấn mạnh báo cáo phải hoàn thành trước

exercises.q: If she ___ late again, her boss will be very angry.
exercises.exp: First conditional – if + present simple trong mệnh đề điều kiện

exercises.q: I'll bring my laptop ___ we need to look something up.
exercises.exp: in case = đề phòng nếu cần dùng → chuẩn bị trước

exercises.q: When water ___ 0°C, it freezes.
exercises.exp: Zero conditional – quy luật vật lý → present simple

exercises.q: Don't move ___ the doctor tells you it's safe.
exercises.exp: until = cho đến khi → phù hợp với lệnh/cảnh báo

exercises.q: Before you ___ to bed, make sure you lock the door.
exercises.exp: Future time clause – sau before → present simple

exercises.q: If you ___ (touch) a hot stove, you burn yourself.
exercises.exp: Zero conditional – hành động và kết quả luôn xảy ra cùng nhau

exercises.q: I ___ (call) you as soon as I land at the airport.
exercises.exp: First conditional / future time clause – will + infinitive trong mệnh đề chính

exercises.q: She won't leave ___ (unless) you apologize to her.
exercises.exp: unless = if not → phù hợp với ngữ cảnh

exercises.q: When you ___ (arrive), give me a call straight away.
exercises.exp: Future time clause – sau when → present simple

exercises.q: I'm taking a first-aid kit ___ (in case) someone gets hurt.
exercises.exp: in case = đề phòng khả năng xảy ra

exercises.q: Once you ___ (finish) this exercise, you can take a break.
exercises.exp: once + present perfect/simple → hoàn thành trước khi nghỉ

exercises.q: If metal ___ (get) hot enough, it melts.
exercises.exp: Zero conditional – sự thật vật lý → present simple

exercises.q: He ___ (not / pass) unless he starts studying immediately.
exercises.exp: First conditional phủ định với unless

exercises.q: I'll wait ___ (until) you have finished your meal.
exercises.exp: until = cho đến khi, phù hợp với ngữ cảnh

exercises.q: After she ___ (graduate), she wants to travel for a year.
exercises.exp: Future time clause – sau after → present simple hoặc present perfect

exercises.q: If you ___ (mix) red and blue, you get purple.
exercises.exp: Zero conditional – sự thật về màu sắc → present simple

exercises.q: She might cry ___ (if) she hears this news.
exercises.exp: First conditional với might → if + present simple

exercises.q: I'll text you before I ___ (leave) the office.
exercises.exp: Future time clause – sau before → present simple

exercises.q: Write this down ___ (in case) you forget later.
exercises.exp: in case = đề phòng trường hợp quên → chuẩn bị trước

exercises.q: I ___ (start) cooking as soon as I get home.
exercises.exp: Future time clause – mệnh đề chính dùng will

exercises.q: ___ (unless) you book in advance, you won't get a table.
exercises.exp: unless = if not

exercises.q: She'll text me as soon as she ___ (know) the result.
exercises.exp: Future time clause – as soon as + present simple

exercises.q: If it ___ (snow) tomorrow, the match might be cancelled.
exercises.exp: First conditional – if + present simple

exercises.q: I'll make extra food ___ (in case) more guests arrive.
exercises.exp: in case = đề phòng

exercises.q: When you ___ (see) him, please give him this message.
exercises.exp: Future time clause – when + present simple

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về kế hoạch của bạn cho kỳ nghỉ sắp tới – những điều kiện để kế hoạch thành công và những gì bạn sẽ làm trong các tình huống khác nhau. Sử dụng first conditional, unless, in case và future time clauses.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: First conditional, unless, in case, future time clauses (when/as soon as/before/after)
writing_prompts.example: I am planning a trip to Da Lat next month and I am really looking forward to it. If the weather is good, we will spend most of our time hiking in the mountains and visiting the flower farms. However, unless we book the accommodation early, we might not find a good place to stay, so I am going to do that as soon as I finish work today. I am also packing warm clothes in case the temperature drops at night, since it can be surprisingly cold there. Before we leave, I will check the road conditions and plan the best route. Once we have arrived, the first thing I want to do is visit the local market and try the famous strawberry desserts. If everything goes to plan, this will be one of our best trips yet.

writing_prompts.vi: Bạn đang lên kế hoạch cho một dự án nhóm quan trọng ở trường hoặc công việc. Mô tả những điều kiện cần thiết để dự án thành công, những rủi ro có thể xảy ra và cách bạn sẽ phòng ngừa chúng. Dùng first conditional, unless, in case và future time clauses.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: First conditional, unless, in case, future time clauses
hint_words: as soon as we agree on
writing_prompts.example: Our team is working on a major presentation for next month, and I want to make sure we approach it as professionally as possible. If everyone contributes equally from the start, the workload will be manageable and the quality will be much higher. Unless we set clear deadlines at the very beginning, some team members will inevitably leave everything until the last minute. I am going to create a shared document in case anyone forgets which tasks they have been assigned. As soon as we all agree on the structure of the presentation, I will book a meeting room for our rehearsal sessions. If the research phase takes longer than expected, we might have to reduce the number of slides, but that is a decision we can make once we have seen how things develop. Unless communication within the group improves significantly, we will struggle to deliver a coherent final product. I will send weekly progress updates in case anyone feels confused about where we are in the process.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả những quy tắc sống hoặc thói quen lành mạnh mà bạn tin là có tác dụng với bất kỳ ai. Sử dụng zero conditional để diễn đạt những sự thật chung, và first conditional để nói về những thay đổi cụ thể có thể thực hiện.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Zero conditional (universal truths about health/habits), First conditional (specific changes and their results)
hint_words: unless you make time for rest
writing_prompts.example: Over the years, I have come to believe that a small number of consistent habits make an enormous difference to how a person feels. If you exercise regularly, even just thirty minutes a day, your energy levels and mood improve noticeably — this seems to hold true regardless of age or fitness level. When people sleep fewer than seven hours a night, concentration drops and decision-making suffers, which is simply how human biology works. If you reduce screen time in the hour before bed, you will almost certainly fall asleep more quickly and wake up feeling more rested. Unless you manage stress through some form of regular outlet — exercise, journalling, talking to friends — it tends to build up and affect every area of your life. On a social level, if a person surrounds themselves with supportive and honest people, they are much more likely to stay motivated through difficult periods. If you build just one new healthy habit this month, the positive effects will begin to ripple outwards into other areas of your life.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về một thành phố hoặc quốc gia bạn muốn sống trong tương lai. Mô tả những điều kiện khiến cuộc sống ở đó tốt hơn hoặc khó khăn hơn, và những bước bạn sẽ thực hiện để đạt được mục tiêu đó. Dùng zero conditional, first conditional và future time clauses.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Zero conditional (facts about the place), First conditional (plans and conditions), Future time clauses
hint_words: as soon as I save enough
if I get a job offer
once I have learned the language
writing_prompts.example: I have always been drawn to the idea of living in Lisbon, Portugal, and I genuinely believe that if everything goes to plan, I could make that move within the next three years. When the weather is warm and the light falls on the old buildings in the afternoon, the city has an atmosphere that is almost impossible to describe — it simply makes people happy. Unless the cost of living continues to rise sharply, Lisbon will remain one of the most affordable capital cities in Western Europe for foreign workers. As soon as I have saved enough money to cover at least six months of expenses, I will start applying for jobs there seriously. If I get a solid job offer, I will give notice at my current position and begin the practical preparations immediately. Before I move, I want to reach at least a conversational level of Portuguese, because I think that if you make the effort to learn the local language, people respond to you very differently. Once I have arrived and settled in, I plan to spend my weekends exploring the surrounding regions.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy mô tả một số quy tắc hoặc sự thật chung trong cuộc sống, khoa học hoặc xã hội mà bạn tin là đúng. Sử dụng zero conditional và first conditional để phân biệt giữa sự thật luôn đúng và khả năng có thể xảy ra.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Zero conditional (general truths), First conditional (likely future situations)
writing_prompts.example: There are certain truths about human behaviour that seem to hold across all cultures and generations. If you do not get enough sleep, your concentration drops and you make more mistakes — this is simply how the brain works. When people feel financially insecure, they tend to save rather than spend, which is why the economy often slows down during uncertain times. On a more personal level, if you practise a skill regularly, you will almost certainly improve, regardless of natural talent. However, some consequences are less automatic. If governments fail to invest in education, future generations will struggle to compete in a changing world. When social inequality grows too large, people will eventually demand change. These patterns remind me that small habits and big policies both have real and predictable consequences.

upper_intermediate.title: When I do vs When I have done: Future Time Clauses
upper_intermediate.content:
📌 Future Time Clauses – Present Simple vs Present Perfect
Sau các liên từ thời gian (when, after, before, until, as soon as, once, while), ta dùng thì hiện tại – KHÔNG BAO GIỜ dùng will.

Present Simple → hành động xảy ra đồng thời với mệnh đề chính:
I'll move out when I find a job. (tìm được việc → chuyển ra → cùng lúc)
We won't eat until the guests arrive.

Present Perfect → nhấn mạnh hành động trong mệnh đề thời gian phải hoàn thành TRƯỚC:
I'll move out when I've found a job. (đã tìm được việc xong → rồi mới chuyển ra)
⚠️ Khi nào Present Simple và Present Perfect đều được?
Khi hành động trong mệnh đề thời gian cần hoàn thành TRƯỚC hành động chính, thường cả hai đều dùng được và có nghĩa tương tự:

I'll go to bed as soon as I finish / have finished my homework.
I won't leave until you arrive / have arrived.

⚠️ Nhưng đôi khi nghĩa thay đổi hoàn toàn:
Present SimplePresent Perfect
We can discuss this when we have dinner.
(= trong khi ăn tối)		We can discuss this when we've had dinner.
(= sau khi ăn tối xong)
When I cook dinner, I'll watch the episode.
(= trong khi nấu)		When I have cooked dinner, I'll watch the episode.
(= sau khi nấu xong)
📌 Khi nào PHẢI dùng Present Simple (không dùng Perfect)?
Khi hành động trong mệnh đề thời gian xảy ra đồng thời với mệnh đề chính (không phải trước):

When I go to France, I'll eat snails. ✅
❌ When I have gone to France, I'll eat snails. (sai – đã đi rồi thì không ăn ốc được)

When I call Jack, I'll invite him. ✅
❌ When I have called Jack, I'll invite him. (sai về logic)
I'll send you the report when I finish it.Hành động đồng thời → Present Simple phù hợp hơn
I'll send you the report when I have finished it.Nhấn mạnh báo cáo phải xong trước → Present Perfect
We can chat when we have dinner.Đồng thời – trong khi ăn → Present Simple
We can chat when we have had dinner.Sau khi ăn xong → Present Perfect

exercises.q: I'll call you when I ___ at the station. (arriving at the same time as the call)
exercises.exp: Hành động đồng thời (vừa đến vừa gọi) → Present Simple

exercises.q: Once she ___ the course, she'll apply for the promotion.
exercises.exp: once + present perfect → nhấn mạnh phải hoàn thành khóa học trước

exercises.q: Let's discuss the plan when we ___ dinner. (= while eating)
exercises.exp: Đồng thời trong khi ăn → Present Simple 'have dinner'

exercises.q: Let's discuss the plan when we ___  dinner. (= after finishing dinner)
exercises.exp: Sau khi ăn xong → Present Perfect 'have had dinner'

exercises.q: I won't sign the contract until my lawyer ___ it.
exercises.exp: until + present perfect → nhấn mạnh luật sư phải kiểm tra xong trước

exercises.q: As soon as she ___ the exam results, she'll contact you.
exercises.exp: as soon as + present simple → hành động xảy ra ngay khi điều kiện đến

exercises.q: When I ___ Paris, I'll visit the Louvre. (= during the trip)
exercises.exp: Hành động đồng thời với chuyến đi → không dùng perfect

exercises.q: I'll relax once I ___ all my deadlines.
exercises.exp: once + present perfect → phải hoàn thành deadline trước khi thư giãn

exercises.q: Before you ___ the email, check it for errors.
exercises.exp: Before + present simple → kiểm tra trước khi gửi

exercises.q: They won't make a decision until they ___ all the options.
exercises.exp: until + present perfect → phải xem xét hết các lựa chọn trước

exercises.q: She'll feel much better after she ___ a good night's sleep.
exercises.exp: after + present perfect → ngủ đủ giấc xong → mới cảm thấy tốt hơn

exercises.q: I'll watch the movie while I ___ dinner. (= at the same time)
exercises.exp: while + present simple → đồng thời

exercises.q: When I ___ cooked dinner, I'll watch the movie. (= after cooking)
exercises.exp: When I have cooked → present perfect → sau khi nấu xong

exercises.q: She'll announce the news as soon as she ___ confirmation.
exercises.exp: as soon as + present simple → nhận được ngay lập tức sẽ thông báo

exercises.q: Don't throw away the receipt until you ___ sure the item works.
exercises.exp: until + present simple → trạng thái đồng thời

exercises.q: He'll start the project once he ___ the budget.
exercises.exp: once + present perfect → ngân sách phải được duyệt xong trước

exercises.q: I'll write to you as soon as I ___ in my new flat.
exercises.exp: as soon as + present simple → khi đã ổn định sẽ viết thư ngay

exercises.q: After you ___ the form, hand it to the receptionist.
exercises.opts: have filled in,fill in,will fill in,filled in
exercises.exp: after + present perfect → điền xong rồi mới nộp

exercises.q: When the guests ___, we'll start the presentation.
exercises.exp: when + present simple → khách đến thì bắt đầu ngay

exercises.q: Once I ___ the report, my boss will review it immediately.
exercises.exp: once + present perfect → nộp xong thì sếp xem ngay

exercises.q: I'll go to bed as soon as I ___ (finish) this chapter.
exercises.exp: as soon as + present simple/perfect – cả hai đều phù hợp

exercises.q: Once you ___ (read) the report, please give me your feedback.
exercises.exp: once + present perfect → đọc xong mới đưa ra phản hồi

exercises.q: We can eat when she ___ (cook) dinner. (= while she's cooking)
exercises.exp: Đồng thời → present simple

exercises.q: We can eat when she ___ (cook) dinner. (= after she finishes cooking)
exercises.exp: Sau khi nấu xong → present perfect

exercises.q: Before you ___ (sign) anything, read the terms carefully.

writing_prompts.vi: Mô tả một kế hoạch quan trọng trong cuộc sống của bạn (ví dụ: tốt nghiệp, chuyển nhà, bắt đầu công việc mới). Mô tả trình tự các bước và điều gì sẽ xảy ra sau khi mỗi bước hoàn thành. Sử dụng when/once/after/as soon as + present perfect để nhấn mạnh hoàn thành, và present simple khi cần.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Future time clauses with present simple vs present perfect (when, once, after, as soon as, before, until)
writing_prompts.example: I have a very clear plan for the next two years and I feel excited just thinking about it. As soon as I have passed my final exams this summer, I will start applying for graduate positions in the field of data science. Once I have sent out at least twenty applications, I will start preparing for the technical interview stage, which I know will be challenging. When I get my first serious job offer, I will discuss it carefully with my family before making a decision. After I have worked for about a year and saved some money, I will move out of my parents' house and rent a flat closer to the city centre. Before I sign any rental agreement, I will have a lawyer look at the terms. Once I have settled into my new place and my new role, I will finally feel like a proper adult with a real life ahead of me.

writing_prompts.vi: Kể về quá trình chuẩn bị cho một kỳ thi quan trọng (thực tế hoặc tưởng tượng). Mô tả chi tiết trình tự các bước chuẩn bị và dùng when/once/after/as soon as + present perfect để nhấn mạnh mỗi giai đoạn phải hoàn thành trước khi bước tiếp theo bắt đầu.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Future time clauses with present perfect (sequential preparation steps)
hint_words: as soon as I have made
as soon as I have identified
writing_prompts.example: I have a very important language certification exam in two months, and I am determined to be as well-prepared as possible. As soon as I have made a detailed revision timetable, I will share it with my study partner so we can keep each other accountable. Once I have reviewed all the grammar points that appeared in previous exam papers, I will move on to practising full past papers under timed conditions. After I have completed at least four full mock exams, I will carefully analyse my mistakes and identify the areas where I am weakest. Once I have identified these gaps, I will spend extra time targeting them specifically. As soon as I have covered all the major topic areas, I will do a final full revision in the week before the exam. Before I sit the exam itself, I will make sure I have had a proper meal and a full night of sleep, because I know from experience that mental freshness is just as important as knowledge. Once I have submitted my answers and walked out of the exam hall, I will treat myself to a proper celebration.

writing_prompts.vi: Bạn đang lên kế hoạch tổ chức một sự kiện đặc biệt (sinh nhật, hội thảo, buổi gặp mặt, v.v.). Mô tả trình tự cụ thể của các công việc chuẩn bị, dùng when/after/once/as soon as kết hợp cả present simple và present perfect một cách tự nhiên.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Future time clauses: present simple (immediate sequence) and present perfect (completed steps before next action)
hint_words: as soon as I have confirmed
as soon as the last guest
writing_prompts.example: I am organising a surprise thirtieth birthday party for my closest friend next month, and the planning is already in full swing. As soon as I have confirmed the venue, I will send out informal invitations to all her friends and family. Once I have received replies from everyone, I will book the catering and give them a final number. Before the event starts, I will arrive at least two hours early to decorate the space and brief the staff. As soon as I have finished arranging the decorations, I will collect the birthday cake from the bakery. When everyone arrives, I will make sure they know to hide and stay quiet — the surprise element is crucial. Once she has walked through the door and seen everyone, I will start the music and the celebrations will begin properly. After we have eaten, I have arranged a short slideshow of photographs from her life, which I think will make everyone emotional. As soon as the slideshow has finished, her best friend will give a short speech. Once the formal parts are over, people can simply relax, dance, and enjoy themselves until late.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy mô tả kế hoạch học tập hoặc phát triển bản thân trong 6 tháng tới. Nêu rõ trình tự các bước và dùng when/once/after/as soon as + present perfect để nhấn mạnh rằng mỗi bước cần hoàn thành trước khi bước tiếp theo bắt đầu.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Future time clauses with present perfect (when, once, after, as soon as) – sequential steps
hint_words: I will then move on to
as soon as I have finished
writing_prompts.example: My plan for the next six months is focused entirely on improving my professional skills and physical health. As soon as I have finished my current work project, I will enrol in an online data analysis course that I have been putting off for months. Once I have completed the first module, I will start practising with real datasets on my own. After I have built enough confidence, I will take on a small freelance project to test my skills in a real environment. In parallel, I am going to start running three times a week. Once I have run my first five kilometres without stopping, I will sign up for a local 10K race. As soon as I have done that, I plan to register for a half marathon. I find that breaking big goals into clear sequential steps makes everything feel much more manageable and motivating.

writing_prompts.vi: Kể về một ngày dài và bận rộn sắp tới của bạn (thực hoặc tưởng tượng). Mô tả chi tiết trình tự sự kiện, dùng when/after/once/as soon as + present simple hoặc present perfect để cho thấy sự nối tiếp tự nhiên của các hành động.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Future time clauses: present simple (simultaneous/immediate actions) vs present perfect (completed before next action)
hint_words: as soon as I wake up
as soon as the meeting finishes

As soon as I wake up, I will check my emails and messages before I even get out of bed. Once I have had a quick breakfast, I will drive my daughter to school before heading to the office. As soon as the last meeting finishes, I will grab a sandwich at my desk and work straight through lunch. After I have dealt with the most urgent emails, I will spend the afternoon preparing a presentation for the following day. Once I have finished that, I will pick my daughter up from school and cook dinner. As soon as we have eaten, I will help her with her homework. Before I go to bed, I will review my notes one more time and set everything out for the next morning. I just hope nothing unexpected comes up.

upper_intermediate.title: Second & Third Conditionals: Unreal Conditionals
upper_intermediate.content:
📌 Second Conditional – Tình huống giả định ở hiện tại/tương lai
Cấu trúc: If + Past Simple/Continuous, would/could/might + infinitive

Dùng để nói về:
✦ Tình huống không có thực hoặc khó xảy ra ở hiện tại/tương lai:
If there were a fire, it would be impossible to escape.
If you weren't making so much noise, I could concentrate.
I wouldn't have a car if I lived in the city.

✦ Cho lời khuyên với if I were you:
If I were you, I would talk to the teacher. (LUÔN dùng were, không dùng was)

⚠️ Với động từ be: dùng were (trang trọng) hoặc was (thông thường) sau I/he/she/it:
If he was/were rich, he wouldn't live here.
📌 Third Conditional – Tình huống giả định trong quá khứ
Cấu trúc: If + Past Perfect, would/could/might + have + past participle

Dùng để nói về tình huống không có thực trong quá khứ và kết quả của nó:
If you had come to class more often, you would have passed the test.
If he hadn't taken his helmet, he could have died.
If the jacket had been a bit cheaper, I might have bought it.

⚠️ KHÔNG dùng would trong mệnh đề if:
❌ If I would have known, I would have called.
✅ If I had known, I would have called.
⚠️ So sánh Second vs Third Conditional
Second ConditionalThird Conditional
Giả định hiện tại/tương laiGiả định quá khứ
if + past simpleif + past perfect
would/could/might + infinitivewould/could/might + have + p.p.
If I had more money, I would travel more.If I had had more money, I would have travelled.
If I won the lottery, I would buy a house.Second conditional – giả định không có thực ở hiện tại
If I had won the lottery, I would have bought a house.Third conditional – giả định quá khứ, điều đã không xảy ra
If I were you, I would apologize immediately.Lời khuyên – luôn dùng were với if I were you

exercises.q: I ___ (call) you sooner if I had found out the news earlier.

exercises.q: If the weather ___ (be) better, we might go camping this weekend.

exercises.q: She wouldn't have been so upset if you ___ (not / say) that.
exercises.exp: Third conditional phủ định – điều đã nói trong quá khứ → past perfect

exercises.q: If I ___ (have) more experience, I would apply for the manager role.
exercises.exp: Second conditional – hiện không đủ kinh nghiệm → past simple

exercises.q: The project ___ (be) a success if the team had communicated better.
exercises.ans: would have been / could have been / might have been
exercises.exp: Third conditional – giao tiếp kém trong quá khứ → would/could/might have been

exercises.q: If I ___ (be) taller, I would have played basketball professionally.
exercises.exp: Third conditional – past perfect

exercises.q: What ___ you ___ (do) if you had found a wallet full of cash?
exercises.exp: Third conditional – câu hỏi giả định quá khứ

exercises.q: She could ___ (reach) the final if she hadn't injured her knee.
exercises.exp: Third conditional – could have + p.p.

exercises.q: If I ___ (not / be) so tired right now, I would help you move.
exercises.exp: Second conditional – mệt hiện tại → past simple phủ định

exercises.q: They would have finished if the client ___ (not / keep) changing the brief.
exercises.exp: Third conditional – past perfect phủ định

exercises.q: If only the doctor ___ (diagnose) it sooner, he might have recovered fully.
exercises.exp: If only + past perfect

exercises.q: He ___ (not / embarrass) himself if he had prepared properly.
exercises.exp: Third conditional phủ định

exercises.q: If she ___ (have) more confidence, she would speak up in meetings.
exercises.exp: Second conditional – thiếu tự tin hiện tại

exercises.q: Could you ___ (finish) the project if you had had more time?
exercises.exp: Third conditional – could have + p.p. trong câu hỏi

exercises.q: If it ___ (not / be) so expensive, I would buy it immediately.
exercises.exp: Second conditional – đắt tiền hiện tại → past simple phủ định

writing_prompts.vi: Nghĩ về một quyết định quan trọng trong quá khứ mà bạn đã đưa ra (hoặc không đưa ra). Nếu bạn quyết định khác, cuộc sống của bạn sẽ thay đổi thế nào? Sử dụng third conditional để nói về quá khứ và second conditional nếu liên quan đến hiện tại.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Third conditional (past regrets/alternatives), Second conditional (present hypothetical consequences)
hint_words: if I were in that situation now
writing_prompts.example: One of the most significant decisions of my life was choosing to study abroad for a year. At the time, I almost didn't go — if my teacher hadn't encouraged me, I would never have applied. Had I stayed home, I would have missed out on experiences that completely shaped the person I am today. If I hadn't moved to a new country at eighteen, I would never have developed the confidence to speak in front of large groups, which is now a core part of my job. I also met some of my closest friends during that year, and if things had gone differently, I would never have known them. Of course, there were difficulties too — if I had prepared better financially, I wouldn't have struggled so much in the first few months. But looking back, I wouldn't change a thing. If I were ever in that position again, I would make exactly the same choice.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy viết về một quyết định quan trọng trong tương lai mà bạn đang cân nhắc (chuyển thành phố, đổi nghề, bắt đầu kinh doanh). Dùng second conditional để nói về các kịch bản giả định và hệ quả của chúng.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Second conditional (hypothetical present/future decisions and consequences)
writing_prompts.example: I have been seriously considering leaving my stable office job and starting my own small business, and I find myself going around in circles thinking about the second conditional implications of that decision. If I quit my job tomorrow and launched the business straight away, the financial pressure would be enormous, and I am not sure I could handle that stress. If I saved for one more year first, I would feel much more secure and could invest properly in the setup costs. If I moved to a smaller city at the same time, the cost of living would drop significantly, which would give the business more time to grow before I needed it to be profitable. Of course, if the business didn't perform well in the first year, I would need to be willing to return to employment without feeling like a failure. If I had a business partner to share the burden with, I think I would feel far more confident about the whole idea. The honest truth is that if I stayed in my current role for the next ten years without trying, I would always wonder what might have been.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết về một sự kiện thể thao, cuộc thi hoặc biểu diễn trong quá khứ mà bạn biết (thực hoặc tưởng tượng). Nếu các yếu tố chính diễn ra khác đi, kết quả sẽ thay đổi thế nào? Dùng third conditional.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Third conditional (alternative outcomes in a past event)
writing_prompts.example: The 2019 Rugby World Cup final between England and South Africa remains one of the most discussed sporting events in recent memory, at least among English rugby supporters who still find it painful to revisit. England went into the match as favourites, and if they had managed to replicate the performance they delivered against New Zealand in the semi-final, the outcome might have been entirely different. If their key ball carrier had not picked up that injury in training during the week before the final, England would have had a much stronger carrying game and could have applied far more physical pressure on the South African defence. Had the English pack held together better in the scrum during the first half, South Africa's forwards would not have been able to dominate as they did. If the tactical decisions in the first twenty minutes had been more conservative, England might have avoided giving away those early penalties. However, South Africa were simply outstanding on the day, and even if England had made all the right decisions, the Springboks would probably still have deserved to win. It is a reminder that in sport, as in life, the difference between victory and defeat often comes down to a handful of moments.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết một đoạn văn về một vấn đề cá nhân hoặc tình huống khó khăn bạn đã trải qua. Hãy dùng cả second và third conditional: third conditional để phản ánh về quá khứ, second conditional để nói về những gì bạn có thể làm khác đi nếu đối mặt với tình huống tương tự bây giờ.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Third conditional (reflecting on what happened), Second conditional (what you would do differently now)
hint_words: if I faced the same situation now
if I were in that position today
writing_prompts.example: A few years ago, I went through a period of intense work-related stress that, looking back, I handled very poorly. At the time, I tried to manage everything alone, and if I had asked for help earlier, the situation would never have escalated as it did. Had I been more open with my manager about the volume of work I was carrying, she would have redistributed the workload and I would not have ended up burning out completely. If I had recognised the warning signs sooner — the poor sleep, the constant anxiety, the inability to switch off — I could have intervened before the problem became serious. I also wish I had maintained some kind of physical routine during that period, because if I had kept exercising even once or twice a week, I would have coped far better mentally. If I were in that same situation today, I would approach it completely differently. I would be much more willing to say directly that I was overwhelmed. I wouldn't try to appear capable of handling everything alone, because I now know that asking for support is not a sign of weakness. If I had understood that back then, I would have saved myself months of unnecessary suffering.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy viết về một vấn đề xã hội hay môi trường mà bạn quan tâm. Nếu con người hành động khác đi trong quá khứ, tình hình sẽ ra sao hiện nay? Và nếu chúng ta hành động ngay bây giờ, tương lai sẽ thay đổi như thế nào?
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Third conditional (what could have been different), Second conditional (what could change now)
hint_words: millions of people would not have
writing_prompts.example: The issue of plastic pollution is one that troubles me deeply, largely because I believe it could have been avoided. If manufacturers had invested in biodegradable materials decades ago, we would not be facing the scale of ocean contamination we see today. Had governments introduced stricter regulations in the 1970s, millions of tonnes of plastic waste might never have entered our ecosystems. The damage done to marine life, in particular, could have been significantly reduced if consumers had been educated earlier about the consequences of single-use products. However, it is not too late to act. If every country were to ban non-essential plastics immediately, scientists believe the recovery of ocean environments could begin within a generation. If corporations redirected even a fraction of their profits into sustainable packaging research, we would see dramatic improvements within a decade. The situation is serious, but it is not irreversible — if only we had the political will to act collectively and urgently.

upper_intermediate.title: Wishes & Regrets: I wish / If only
upper_intermediate.content:
📌 I wish / If only – Cấu trúc và cách dùng
I wish và if only có nghĩa tương tự. If only thường mạnh hơn, thể hiện cảm xúc mạnh hơn (tiếc nuối, thất vọng).

DùngCấu trúcVí dụ
Mong muốn điều khác đi ở hiện tại/tương lai (không có thực)wish/if only + Past SimpleI wish I had more money. (Tôi ước tôi có nhiều tiền hơn)
Tiếc về điều đã xảy ra ở quá khứwish/if only + Past PerfectI wish I hadn't quit my job. (Ước gì tôi không nghỉ việc)
Muốn ai đó (hoặc gì đó) thay đổi hành vi – bực bội, khó chịuwish + person/thing + wouldI wish you would stop biting your nails. (Bực vì cứ cắn móng tay)
📌 Phân biệt chi tiết
1. Wish + Past Simple → Mong muốn điều ngược lại với HIỆN TẠI:
I wish I spoke Japanese. (= Tôi không nói được tiếng Nhật, tôi ước mình có thể)
I wish things were different. (= Nhưng thực tế không thể thay đổi được)
I wish I could be there for you.

2. Wish + Past Perfect → Tiếc nuối về QUÁKHỨ:
I wish I hadn't wasted all that money.
If only she had studied harder – she could have passed.

3. Wish + would → Phàn nàn, muốn ai/cái gì thay đổi (thường dùng về người khác):
I wish it would stop raining. (= Trời vẫn đang mưa, tôi bực quá)
I wish you would listen to me for once!

⚠️ KHÔNG dùng wish + I/we + would:
❌ I wish I would be taller. → ✅ I wish I were taller.
I wish I lived closer to work.Wish + past simple → mong muốn ngược với thực tế hiện tại
If only I had studied harder at school!If only + past perfect → tiếc nuối về quá khứ
I wish you would turn down the music.Wish + would → bực bội, muốn người khác thay đổi
She wishes she could afford a holiday this year.Wish + could + infinitive → muốn nhưng không thể

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy viết về những điều bạn ước muốn trong cuộc sống hiện tại và những điều bạn tiếc nuối trong quá khứ. Sử dụng 'I wish', 'If only' với past simple (hiện tại) và past perfect (quá khứ), kèm wish + would cho những điều bạn muốn thay đổi ở người khác hoặc tình huống bên ngoài.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: I wish/if only + past simple (present wishes), past perfect (past regrets), would (complaints/annoyances)
writing_prompts.example: When I reflect honestly on my life, there are quite a few things I wish were different. I wish I lived somewhere with more open space — I love the city, but I miss the countryside where I grew up. I also wish I could play a musical instrument. I tried to learn guitar as a teenager, but I gave up too quickly, and now I regret it deeply. If only I had been more patient with myself back then — I think I would have kept going. Looking back on my education, I wish I had studied a language more seriously at university. I had the opportunity to do a language module, but I chose something else without much thought. If only I had known how important communication skills would be in my career. On a more everyday level, I wish people would be more considerate on public transport — it is such a small thing, but it makes a big difference to how you feel. And I wish my neighbours would stop slamming doors at midnight. Despite these wishes, I do feel grateful for many things. But acknowledging what we would change is, I think, part of growing.

writing_prompts.vi: Tưởng tượng bạn đang viết một lá thư gửi cho bản thân trẻ hơn (ví dụ: lúc 16 tuổi). Chia sẻ những điều bạn ước gì mình đã biết hoặc làm, sử dụng wish/if only, và lời khuyên ở dạng conditional.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: I wish + past perfect (regrets about the past), If only + past perfect, Second conditional (advice)
hint_words: I wish I had told you
had you taken the time to
writing_prompts.example: Dear sixteen-year-old me, there are so many things I wish I could tell you, though I know you probably wouldn't have listened. I wish you had known that the friendships you are so desperate to hold onto will fade naturally, and that is completely normal. If only you had spent less energy trying to fit in and more time figuring out what you actually enjoyed. I wish you hadn't been so afraid of being different — if you had embraced your individuality earlier, you would have been so much happier in your twenties. I also wish you had taken your health more seriously. If you had exercised regularly and slept properly, you would have had so much more energy during those exhausting university years. If only someone had explained that failure is not the end of anything — it is how you learn. I wish you had applied for that creative writing competition. You would probably have won, or at least grown enormously from the experience. Most of all, I wish you had trusted yourself more. If you had believed in your own judgment, you would have made fewer decisions based on fear and more based on genuine hope.

writing_prompts.vi: Viết một đoạn văn về những điều bạn ước muốn thay đổi ở môi trường xung quanh bạn — thành phố, trường học, nơi làm việc, hoặc xã hội nói chung. Sử dụng I wish/if only với past simple (thực tế hiện tại) và wish + would (phàn nàn về hành vi).
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: I wish + past simple (present wishes about surroundings), wish + would (complaints about behaviour or situations)
writing_prompts.example: When I look at the environment I live and work in, there are quite a few things I wish were different. I wish my city had more green spaces and parks where people could walk, relax, and breathe clean air. The roads are permanently congested, and I wish drivers would be more considerate of cyclists and pedestrians — the aggression I witness on my commute every morning is genuinely exhausting. If only public transport were more reliable and affordable, fewer people would feel the need to drive at all. I wish the government would invest more seriously in cycling infrastructure instead of simply announcing plans that never seem to materialise. On a wider social level, if only workplaces were more flexible about remote working arrangements — the technology exists and many jobs could easily be done from home. I also wish society placed more genuine value on rest and balance, rather than glorifying people who work themselves into the ground. I wish the air in this city were cleaner and the streets quieter. These might sound like small complaints, but together they add up to something significant: the quality of the environment we live in shapes our wellbeing in ways we often underestimate.

writing_prompts.vi: Tưởng tượng bạn đang ở cuối cuộc đời và nhìn lại. Bạn ước gì mình đã làm khác đi? Bạn ước gì mình đã biết sớm hơn? Dùng I wish/if only với past perfect (tiếc nuối quá khứ) một cách phong phú và sâu sắc.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: I wish/if only + past perfect (deep regrets about a lifetime of choices)
hint_words: I wish I had spent more
if only I had been brave enough to
if only I had known how quickly
I wish I hadn't let fear
writing_prompts.example: Looking back across a long life from this quiet final chapter, I find my thoughts returning again and again to the things I wish I had done differently. I wish I had spent more unhurried time with my parents while they were still alive — I was always too busy, always assuming there would be more time, and there wasn't. If only I had told the people I loved, more often and more clearly, how much they meant to me. I was raised to believe that feelings were better kept inside, and I wish I hadn't let that belief steal so many moments of genuine connection from me. I wish I hadn't wasted so many years worrying about what other people thought of my choices. If only I had been brave enough to pursue the kind of work that truly excited me, instead of the kind that simply seemed sensible and safe. I wish I had travelled more when I was young and physically capable — if only I had realised how much those experiences would have shaped my understanding of the world. Above all, I wish I had been kinder to myself. I spent decades holding myself to a standard of perfection that no human being could ever meet, and I wish I had understood far sooner that being imperfect is not the same as being inadequate.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy viết về một nhân vật lịch sử hoặc nhân vật trong một cuốn sách/phim mà bạn biết. Nếu họ đã hành động khác đi ở một thời điểm quan trọng, lịch sử hoặc câu chuyện sẽ thay đổi như thế nào? Sử dụng third conditional và if only.
writing_prompts.grammar_focus: Third conditional (alternative history), if only (regret from perspective of character or narrator)
hint_words: if only the world had known
writing_prompts.example: Romeo and Juliet is perhaps the most famous example of a tragedy that could have been entirely avoided. If only the two families had put aside their ancient rivalry, two young people would not have lost their lives. If Friar Lawrence had sent the message about Juliet's plan more reliably, Romeo would not have believed she was dead. Had Romeo waited just a few more minutes before acting in despair, he would have seen her wake up, and the entire story would have ended differently. If only Juliet had woken even a few moments earlier, she would have stopped Romeo in time. Looking at the broader picture, if the Prince had intervened sooner in the feud between the families, the tragedy might have been prevented altogether. The play leaves us with a profound sense of loss and the painful feeling that so much suffering could have been avoided with better communication, less pride, and a little more time. If only the world of the play had allowed these young people to love freely — how different everything would have been.
